context.userMessage: Approved. Go ahead with the plan.

rationale: Add compass rose animation during timeline playback. updateCompassRose now accepts hourIndex and uses per-direction hourly scores from the API.
implementation: 6 targeted changes: (1) updateCompassRose accepts hourIndex param with hourly data lookup, (2-3) advanceTimeline calls updateCompassRose on both reset and advance, (4) slider handler calls updateCompassRose, (5) initial load passes currentHourIndex, (6) startPlayback reset calls updateCompassRose.
